project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Unsuccessful attempt made to RIH with milling BHA with well flowing, reached 240ft then POOH due to large drops in tension. Flowing well since night shift. Plan forward is to try flow the well at a lower choke and make another attempt at some point today. Latest lookahed has MFC rig up 6th July but TBC as yet to start milling.

project: PRJ03335 - Perenco - Wytch Farm - F-22 - MFC
comment: MH arrived on site Perenco, gave me a coverall. Now start testing tool. Logging expect tomorrow nigth.
